# Switch-like custom control structure with multiple captured parts.

DUP ( X[1] -- X[1] X[1] )
2DROP ( X[2] X[1] -- )
DROP ( X -- )
: PARSE WORD DEFINE COLON IMMEDIATE STATE INTERPRET ( -- )
; CONTROL END IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )
LITERAL INTEGER ( -- n )
SWITCH CONTROL SWITCH IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( n -- )
OF CONTROL OF IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )
DEFAULT CONTROL DEFAULT IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )
ENDSWITCH CONTROL ENDSWITCH IMMEDIATE STATE COMPILE ( -- )

SYNTAX:
  SWITCH <selector>
  OF <first branch>
  OF <second branch>
  [DEFAULT <default branch>]
  ENDSWITCH
  EFFECT:
    <selector>
    SWITCH
    either <first branch> <second branch> <default branch>
